description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a predominantly green exterior and a flat, slightly sloped roof. The front side is open, providing a service counter area, while the rear wall is solid and displays a large, rectangular sign or digital display. The side panels are partially enclosed, with the lower half solid and the upper half open, allowing for visibility and ventilation. The kiosk appears to be constructed mainly from metal or composite panels, with glass or acrylic elements possibly used for the open sections. Its design is modern and functional, suitable for use as a street-side vendor, information booth, or ticket counter in urban environments.
description: A modern, green kiosk with a flat sloped roof, open front counter, and solid rear wall featuring a large sign. Side panels are partially enclosed for visibility and ventilation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open front counter, solid lower panel, and open upper section for visibility.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open service counter and the green side panels flanking the entry.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side, with open upper section and solid lower panel.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a large, rectangular sign or display on a solid green wall.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign or digital display, rectangular, placed on the rear wall; no visible text discernible
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway at the front
attribute_roof_design: flat, slightly sloped roof, likely metal or composite, no overhangs or decorative elements
